query:
SELECT i.code, i.text, i.orderIndex 
FROM indicators i
JOIN criteria c ON i.criteriaId = c.id
JOIN domains d ON c.domainId = d.id
WHERE d.code = '3'
ORDER BY c.orderIndex, i.orderIndex;
